mapper.insert: INSERT INTO article_collect (user_id, article_id, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{articleId}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM article_collect WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND article_id = #{articleId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id as userId, article_id as articleId FROM article_collect WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND article_id = #{articleId} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, user_id as userId, article_id as articleId FROM article_collect WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM article_collect WHERE article_id = #{articleId}
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM article_collect WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND article_id = #{articleId}
